items.title: Big-O Complexity
items.description: Big-O quantifies both axes (time and space); the tradeoff is choosing how much of each to spend.

items.title: Dynamic Programming
items.description: DP buys speed with a memo / table; row-rolling and state-compression trade memory back for the same speed.

items.title: Hash Tables
items.description: Building a hash table is the canonical 'pay memory to save lookup time' move.

items.title: Sorting Algorithms
items.description: Sort once + binary search many trades O(n log n) one-time work for O(log n) per query forever.

items.title: Problem-Solving Patterns
items.description: Many patterns are positions on the time-space curve (prefix sums, sliding window, DP). Recognizing the tradeoff is part of pattern selection.

items.title: Profiling & Optimization Mindset
items.description: Profiling reveals which axis is the bottleneck, which then dictates which tradeoff to make.
